name: Cozy Cat by the Window
subject: cozy
prompt: a round fluffy cat curled up asleep on a windowsill cushion with calm closed eyes, a window behind it with simple curtains, a small potted plant on the sill and a steaming teacup beside the cat

name: Cozy Reading Nook
subject: cozy
prompt: a snug reading nook with a plump comfy armchair, a soft blanket draped over the arm, a tall stack of books beside it, a small side table holding a steaming mug, and a leafy hanging plant above

name: Hot Cocoa and Blanket
subject: cozy
prompt: a big steaming mug of hot cocoa topped with three round marshmallows, nestled inside a chunky knitted blanket with a folded edge, a candy cane resting against the mug, and a few little stars and a crescent moon floating around
